Horror Is Actually Scary
Lots Of Potential
Would Recommend

so me and my friend basically go hunting for gorilla tag horror games, and we came across this one! The game is fun, has good graphics, and even has cosmetics, and items that are holdable! The map is well made, and the monsters are pretty scary. For sure will be making a video on this! 10/10 definitely recommend
